findings.title: SRP Violation: Predictor class has 5+ responsibilities
findings.impact: Predictor violates SRP by combining ensemble prediction coordination, domain classification with keyword fallback, SHAP/attention explanations, mock prediction logic, keyword-based explanations

findings.title: SRP Violation: EnsembleClassifier handles prediction, caching, and optimization
findings.impact: EnsembleClassifier has three distinct responsibilities that should be separate classes

findings.title: SRP Violation: FakeNewsClassifier and CurriculumLearningScheduler in same file
findings.impact: train.py contains LightningModule wrapper AND curriculum learning scheduler AND training orchestration

findings.title: OCP Violation: _classify_domain has hardcoded domain keywords
findings.impact: Adding new domains requires modifying Predictor class directly. Should use Strategy pattern

findings.title: OCP Violation: load_raw_data has hardcoded dataset file paths
findings.impact: Adding new dataset sources requires modifying preprocessing.py. Should use factory pattern

findings.title: DIP Violation: Predictor depends on concrete EnsembleClassifier
findings.impact: High-level Predictor module depends on low-level EnsembleClassifier concrete implementation

findings.title: DIP Violation: ui/app.py imports concrete model classes
findings.impact: UI module directly depends on concrete model implementations

findings.title: SRP Violation: ui/app.py mixes UI setup, input handling, and analysis
findings.impact: app.py handles page config, sidebar, tabs, input processing, analysis execution, and result display

findings.title: SRP Violation: pipeline.py contains 8 stage classes plus orchestrator
findings.impact: pipeline.py has 8 stage classes plus main orchestrator. Each stage should be in separate files

findings.title: SRP Violation: llm_client.py has 7 LLM provider classes
findings.impact: llm_client.py contains 7 classes. Each provider should be in separate module

findings.title: ISP Violation: EnsembleClassifier interface is too broad
findings.impact: EnsembleClassifier exposes 15+ methods. Should split into PredictionInterface, ModelLoader, WeightOptimizer

findings.title: LSP Violation: LLM providers may have inconsistent mock behavior
findings.impact: Each LLM provider has its own _mock_generate implementation with different error handling
